notes.imdb: real IMDB tconst (imdb_id LIKE 'tt%'); excludes tmdb_orphan synthetic ids
notes.episode_tmdb: episode-grain TMDB resolved via EPISODE-TMDB-PROPAGATE-001 (direct imdb tconst → source.tmdb_tv_episodes.tmdb_episode_id, plus series_tmdb_id propagation).

sources.fyi: curated.nielsen_gn_identity_xref distinct FYI_PROGRAM_ID linked to spine
sources.nielsen_titles: distinct spine titles with Nielsen telecast data
